steps.title: Divide the coefficients
steps.content:
Simplify the numeric part of the fraction first, then handle the variable powers separately.
$$
\frac{8}{24}=\frac{1}{3}
$$

steps.title: Subtract the exponents
steps.content: When dividing powers with the same base, subtract the exponents. $$ \frac{8v^{15}}{24v^5}=\frac{1}{3}v^{15-5}=\frac{v^{10}}{3} $$ The answer is B.
